en: Where am I going to put them?
vi: Toi se de chung o dau day?

en: There we go clean as a whistle right
ja: はい、きれいぴかぴかでしょ
vi: Nao, sach bong roi dung khong
Oi khong, xong doi ban roi

en: Get rid of your own leaves and you can have some of mine while you're ready
ko: 네 낙엽이나 치워, 내 것도 좀 가져가든가
ja: 自分の落ち葉を片付けろ、ついでに私のもどうぞ
zhTW: 先清你自己的落葉，你也可以順便拿我的
vi: Don la cua ban di, ban co the lay luon la cua toi
